filing.heading: We'll remind you for the 2026 filing
filing.description: The 2025 season closed on May 25. Leave your email and we'll tell you when filing opens for your 2026 income.

broker.heading: Get notified when it leaves beta
broker.description: Leave your email and we'll message you when support leaves beta. If you like, send us an anonymized statement to help us validate it faster.

successDetail: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to join the list. Check your Spam folder too.
consent: We only email you about this and you can unsubscribe anytime. See our
errorGeneric: We couldn't process your request. Please try again.
errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in 15 minutes.
errorNetwork: Connection lost. Check your internet and try again.
